raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"tool_usage_preference","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"Evernote is a fantastic tool for organizing digital coupons, and since you're already familiar with it, it's a no-brainer to use it for couponing as well.","distilled_fact":"The user uses Evernote for couponing and is already familiar with Evernote."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon_item_preference","confidence":0.74,"matched_text":"It's great that you're receiving coupons in the mail, especially for your favorite snacks!","distilled_fact":"The user receives coupons in the mail for favorite snacks."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon_item","confidence":0.69,"matched_text":"Granola bars are a popular item, and $1 off is a nice discount.","distilled_fact":"Granola bars are a coupon-related item in the conversation."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"organization_method","confidence":0.71,"matched_text":"You might want to consider creating a separate notebook or tag in Evernote specifically for your snack coupons, so you can easily find them when you're planning your shopping trip.","distilled_fact":"The user may prefer creating a separate notebook or tag in Evernote specifically for snack coupons."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"organization_method","confidence":0.67,"matched_text":"When you receive coupons in the mail, try to categorize them as soon as possible. You can sort them by expiration date, product type, or brand.","distilled_fact":"The user may prefer categorizing coupons by expiration date, product type, or brand as soon as possible after receiving them in the mail."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"digitization_method","confidence":0.68,"matched_text":"Also, consider scanning or taking a clear photo of the coupon and uploading it to Evernote.","distilled_fact":"The user may prefer scanning coupons or taking clear photos of coupons and uploading them to Evernote."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon_record_detail","confidence":0.63,"matched_text":"You can also add notes to the digital coupon, such as the expiration date or any specific purchase requirements.","distilled_fact":"The user can add notes to a digital coupon in Evernote, including an expiration date or specific purchase requirements."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon_usage_constraint","confidence":0.7,"matched_text":"Remember to check the coupon's terms and conditions to see if it can be combined with other offers or digital coupons.","distilled_fact":"A coupon may be combinable with other offers or digital coupons if its terms and conditions allow it."}]}
